'''Vane''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bakuran]] who was sent by [[Wilek Nereus]] to start trouble with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] on the landing pad they were assigned to. He and several others mistook a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] for a [[Ssi-ruu]], resulting in the deaths of two Bakurans.<ref name="The Truce at Bakura" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'' {{1st}}
